sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 445 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25 2. For orders on CMA No.509/2022 3. For hearing of main case 21.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant On the last date following order was passed: “14.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2022 without any progress. Six questions of law are proposed, however, prima-facie each of them appears to agitate factual controversy and / or is argumentative in nature. Learned counsel remained unable to assist, therefore, let Commissioner Inland Revenue, LTO, Karachi be present in court to assist on the next date. To come up on 21.10.2025” Today, Mr. Abdul Hafeez, Commissioner Inland Revenue, LTO, Karachi, is present and states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
